chapter_title: 真人感窗口人像 LoRA 测试 V2

panels.scene_description: near-real full-body portrait of an East Asian woman squatting by a bright window in a red dress and black pantyhose

resolved_prompt.positive: beautiful East Asian woman, long brown-black hair, delicate facial proportions, brown eyes, natural lips, realistic eyelashes, large bright window, grey curtain, soft daylight, wooden floor, indoor natural light, airy apartment interior, full-body composition, squatting pose, looking back toward camera, clearly wearing a fitted long-sleeve red dress made of visible red fabric, dress fully covering torso, waist and hips, black semi-sheer pantyhose clearly covering both legs, red ankle-strap high heels, soft smile, realistic skin, realistic knees and hands, bright window rim light, grey curtains, clean wood floor, shallow depth of field, natural feminine pose, very close to real photo, clothed fashion portrait, no fabric draped around body, elegant fashion photo finish, photorealistic, realistic skin texture, realistic skin pores, cinematic daylight, soft backlight, realistic depth of field, premium texture detail, realistic photography look
resolved_prompt.negative: cartoon, 2d, painting, illustration, overprocessed beauty skin, plastic skin, low quality, worst quality, blurry, deformed anatomy, extra fingers, text, watermark, office props, smartphone, empty limbs, duplicate body parts, broken hands, anime face, heavy cel shading, exaggerated giant eyes, posterized skin, oversharpened edges, white cloth, cream cloth, beige cloth, blanket, towel, shawl, wrap dress made from loose fabric, nude shoulder wrap, exposed shoulders, off-shoulder cream garment, white dress, ivory dress, bathrobe, black shoes

resolved_render.notes: Photoreal LoRA benchmark v2: keep the new LoRA plus 4x-UltraSharp finish from r04, but return to the more wardrobe-balanced wording strategy from r02 instead of the harsher constraint stack from later prompt-only tests.

narration: 这一版是折中版：保留新资产的成片感，同时拿回 r02 的服装平衡。
